name: Rapid Backend Builder
description: Fast-tracks the backend implementation plan: API skeleton, data store choice, and corners-cut registry.

checks.prompt: Design a rapid MVP backend: (1) 4 API endpoints (method + path + one-line description), (2) data store choice for MVP speed (in-memory / SQLite / Postgres — justify), (3) 3 shortcuts taken vs production and why they are acceptable for MVP, (4) estimated implementation time in days. Optimise for SHIP SPEED.

Define the MVP data store schema — optimised for quick implementation, not long-term scalability. List 2-3 tables/collections with minimal essential fields. Flag fields that would need to be added post-MVP. Context: {retryContext}
